# sakura_addon_datalake (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Addon DataLake.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_addon_datalake" "foobar" {
  id = "addon-resource-id" // sakura- prefix
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the Addon DataLake

### Read-Only

- `deployment_name` (String) The deployment name of the Addon DataLake
- `location` (String) The location of the Addon DataLake
- `performance` (Number) The performance setting of the Addon DataLake.
- `redundancy` (Number) The redundancy setting of the Addon DataLake.
- `url` (String) The URL of the Addon DataLake
